rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE RALLO-ECKHOFF et al VS. ARCON CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 20, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs VLADIMIR LIBOV and ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION's FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to April 13, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B an provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than March 20, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
